page: Amazon Web Services m6id.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the AWS Nitro System. It features 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores based on the x86_64 Intel Xeon 8375C processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 192 GB of DDR4 memory running at 3 GHz, providing a balanced 4 GB of RAM per vCPU. Local storage is bundled, consisting of 2850 GB of NVMe SSD instance store capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 19 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core performance, with the Passmark CPU score and Geekbench multi-core score both placing in the top 25% tier. The processor's cryptographic capabilities are highlighted by a strong Passmark CPU encryption test result, aided by hardware-accelerated instruction sets such as AES and VAES. Image processing tasks also perform in the top 25% tier. In contrast, while small-scale language model inference for text generation is strong, larger workloads like text generation with a 70B parameter model fall into the bottom 25% tier due to the lack of dedicated GPU hardware.

The inclusion of high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage alongside a balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio offers high resource density for workloads requiring temporary high-speed storage. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for applications that benefit from local scratch space without requiring separate EBS volume provisioning. The instance is suited for general-purpose workloads, database operations, multi-threaded data processing, image processing, and web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services m6id.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the AWS Nitro System, featuring 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8375C processor running at 3.5 GHz. It includes 192 GB of DDR4 memory and a bundled 2850 GB NVMe SSD local instance store. The instance delivers strong multi-core and cryptographic performance, as evidenced by top-tier Passmark CPU and Geekbench multi-core benchmark results. With a baseline network bandwidth of 19 Gbps and a balanced 4 GB of RAM per vCPU, this server is optimized for workloads requiring high-speed local storage and robust multi-threaded compute capabilities. It is well-suited for database hosting, multi-threaded data processing, image processing, and general-purpose enterprise applications.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage and strong multi-core Intel Xeon processing power.

192 GB of DDR4 memory and 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Strong multi-core CPU and cryptographic benchmark performance
